textByHash.085b868a71405a8c35902e821a711ff7be000d10: That's fantastic! You'd better take them to the Fairy Godfather though; he'd be cross if he knew you brought them to me first. But, come back to me once the queen has had a chance to recover. I'm sure she'll want to thank you personally.
textByHash.0ae30629bb0e1200e0c5adc714f19a5abc1e49d4: Oh, , you're back! I'm so glad. Did you manage to get the secateurs?
textByHash.0cba836022ee6e4af2b2d31d3fd53dad35ba1d02: Oh, thank you! I really need help, I have no idea what ails the Queen. You must be a mighty healer!
textByHash.10606c60de159fed5369e251219aedf9c7f1225e: You're back soon! Did you find out what ails the Fairy Queen?
textByHash.125f758bb75e1cd77f66df052f830cf63f59b0c3: I don't like war! I don't believe that violence is ever justified, that's why I became a healer.
textByHash.1359d46b1b1ab9cd46a91ac5322124ca7d6efb82: I don't have to tell you again how important it is that you hurry!
textByHash.190589614bba8848f72e8818a87d203b254eb585: noticed that lots of my friends were missing, when I asked him about them he said they were off working for him and then he threatened to have his bodyguards pull my wings off! I was scared for the Queen, and so I
textByHash.1946c76a97f06b3797ead961d362cfb3c0e1a7ba: You found us! I'm so glad, I was afraid you wouldn't get my message.
textByHash.1bc087f0ad9187f597f3a09465c9173bc33181b2: Isn't it obvious? He wants to rule Zanaris instead of the Fairy Queen. The latest fairies to arrive have even reported that he has invited all sorts of monsters to the Lost City.
textByHash.290a2e81d7ca5d8ad28d53d0093ebb8c1cae83a3: I'm sure the Godfather told you that the Queen is in an enchanted sleep?
textByHash.29277c03d3a3072e1fcb81705425ba2d6533b9cc: Ok. If you want to know anything, just ask.
textByHash.2ad4b3d62d21fd8d3609f1b44c3af363cc6c7f95: When I returned to Zanaris I found my cave ransacked! There were other fairies that had been attacked by the Godfather and so we fled the city and came here. I managed to hide a note that I hoped you
textByHash.2ddbc8ec6263a2a2731713cfb138e0a76f8021e6: I can't believe you did that! You know how important it is that I get those secateurs as soon as possible! Please go and find them immediately!
textByHash.30423116365aaff5173a5d7b5ff904467c7df154: Maybe to you, but you'd be surprised how many adventurer's are willing to pay those prices.
textByHash.3058244ab59f24e6817eb1582b3e9f40a683d39d: But back to the problem at hand - the Fairy Queen. She was brought here after her battle with the Tanglefoot in a terrible state, extremely weak and barely able to fly!
textByHash.3873b5e04bcaf21864a5cc65741b7dcaad413f18: only way onto or off of their world is through the fairy rings.
textByHash.393617c3b8e5557006c5f4733a4ce4d44b50b738: Hello . How are you getting on with making that potion?
textByHash.3d6311e9485d2c94384d232e80a8eb918f6a7447: Oh, I'm the resident healer. My name is Nuff, Fairy Nuff. Who are you?
textByHash.3e707c7637a027de486485d3263cb206d0c34aa5: You don't have an emerald or a red topaz to pay me with!
textByHash.400160aafbe218849147d2f6f89a6b932dd76f1b: Hello , do you need any assistance?
textByHash.403d54cfcc0ca7dcbee52f863365835d2e27fe1c: How's that potion of Magic Essence coming along?
textByHash.439409b506462862d87219c4c12e5fddddf71fd0: You don't have a opal to pay me!
textByHash.43b1e6a1afa80a7bb6d28c2470003ffea629d1f8: Yes, we have. There is one small chance that we might be able to wake her up still, but I'd need a potion of Magic Essence.
textByHash.471c2227d2f0c6f67db17ad00bafda149155629c: Well, the gold that you humans are so fond of has no real value in Zanaris, so I ask my patients to pay me in gems.
textByHash.496eecd44433445a8083ca44ce31b3a3f2ea8bb2: Shhh, somebody might hear. Look you're a visitor, so I'll tell you this much; it doesn't pay to talk about the Godfather behind his back.
textByHash.4aa0366cefbbeb0a9b719080bb3eddac6620b07e: Pleased to meet you. As I was saying, I'm the healer in Zanaris. I graduated over 200 human years ago. Look, there's my Advanced Healing Certificate on the wall. I never go anywhere without it.
textByHash.4d3910a3c7838e785e561fd0a2273bec2c6cf6b6: Sure, how many hitpoints would you like me to heal?
textByHash.511a1639add7eddffa05340e11da6790f72f9e56: You don't have a diamond to pay me!
textByHash.69e1db4a756c082fe0baef083cb77a73f5bcd95f: That's nice for you, but please stop wasting time. You need to finish the potion with a Gorak's claw.
textByHash.6a54dcced7c4a94554d5c76a335238d6f2a0f1e1: poisons and that's what the Queen is suffering from - a poisoning of her life essence. Then we need to add the catalyst ingredient; a powdered Gorak's claw. Goraks drain the life from their prey, so by using one of their
textByHash.6aef0d16d02e644c44792e9f07cb8119954a2e1f: Yes they do. Silly isn't it? I do use my healing magic on humans sometimes, but I don't like them attacking our other guests, so I charge them for the service.
textByHash.6e615075f20bf201a5cf634c45297d6196163910: You don't have a sapphire or a piece of jade with you!
textByHash.6fb31b2618197ee4bc942f638a499defc80edc6d: After you brought back the Queen's enchanted secateurs and gave them to the Fairy Godfather, I went to him to ask for them so that I could wake Her Majesty up, but he refused to give them to me. Then I
textByHash.715208429633f12567eb978f57740b1f6f7ad6e9: That will cost you 1 sapphire or 1 piece of jade.
textByHash.7e12dc9e054822a7231ac1b26fa07bcad1d53926: Fantastic! Let's just hope that it's not too late ...
textByHash.803ee546aaf2e3bcdff02817f783a152cf0a9759: Oh no! It didn't work! She's been asleep too long!
textByHash.856a57dbaf178a7cc456862d6aa0365ad4e60c54: You don't have a ruby to pay me!
textByHash.86034174205e8559b01b1db0d421a6ff132267fb: Now, what I need you to do is find a mage by the name of Zandar Horfyre. He has spent many years studying magical illness. Take the list to him and ask him if he knows what ails the Queen, please.
textByHash.897a579ea5d4f95d55b2d776794fb15332cc9b59: Oh, that's fantastic! Please give it to Her Majesty immediately.
textByHash.9602be23bf5fdf29ec8840c06c18b201e793cb57: What are you doing? You need to get those secateurs back very urgently!
textByHash.a5805ee0cc4fd89bc939a38dfbfbe9a364f4cb70: I believe he now resides in the Dark Wizard's tower near Falador, and , please hurry. I fear the Queen doesn't have much time left!
textByHash.a9877241bb7e42deeb1ecffefc47474e83d4fd87: That will cost you 1 emerald or 1 red topaz.
textByHash.acc8169b757ba721d8dd7dc0022861d495951690: It's my job to look after the sick, wounded or dying fairies around here. Of course, fairies being magical by nature, not many of them get hurt, so I don't normally have much to do.
textByHash.b2527f94fb3ab891d23ec676c4dece4d3b11ac3e: But hang on, you might be just the sort of person I need to help me!
textByHash.b8e8fd309b1a2066580e60404f204a285a9dd704: A potion of magic essence is made in the same way as any other potion, first you mix a vial of water with a base herb, in this case a Star Flower. Star Flowers are rich in magic essence and are excellent for curing
textByHash.bbc9280e47ba82c3c9112f77ba6831dc4bb02b55: claws we are hoping to draw the Queen's life essence back.
textByHash.c2d126f1e9f0fc888ef8e8915f049ea1186316f0: Yes, I heard. It's just not what I was expecting to hear.
textByHash.c693c0e9c7e451ccba382d507218092b0a7c7e41: Thank you, but you'd better keep hold of it. You can't get to this hideout without it.
textByHash.c9f5caa511458fc43e204504158f413709ba4c22: Oh, how rude of me! this is Fairy Very Wise, advisor to the Queen. Fairy Very Wise, this is .
textByHash.d061664265dcc1167c258c7c24d10d6045febe9e: Well not to worry, I have a copy of it here.
textByHash.d0a0fa1bc923e8813d63875cc8aa39c36dac580b: vicious creatures that draw the life essence from any living thing they find. It seems that in drawing the life force from the world that they live on they have trapped themselves on a small plane, as far as I am aware, the
textByHash.d2985251dd16b2f1d9d7d18ff3219b9165187ddd: That's great news! Well what are you waiting for? We need that potion as soon as possible!
textByHash.dc7455a57958880e619300531abc99d83716776f: I will heal 4 hitpoints for an opal, 5 hitpoints for either a sapphire or a piece of jade, 7 hitpoints for an emerald or red topaz, 9 for a ruby and 11 for a diamond.
textByHash.e597f3991676eee5fc55c608dc8db43564d0f935: Not too well; the Godfather hasn't given me those secateurs yet.
textByHash.e64601ed906fb9008a03ff682130335b626fec27: Sorry, I'm very busy and can't chat. If you want to know something go and talk to the Godfather.
textByHash.ee63da85ab3d6c140f8d3c312edc1ccd7aa54871: Star Flowers only grow on the higher planes and even there they are extremely rare. You should be able to access some of the higher planes by using the fairy rings. Goraks also live on a different plane. They are
textByHash.f0370bd1a1fe3f2e026c15d801789f6df425b7cb: When the Queen got back here, she was clearly weakening fast. It appears as if the magic force that is her life essence is slowly unravelling.
